name: Diabolik Lovers || Haunted dark bridal
description:
Oh no, you just stumbled into the Sakamaki manor. What will you do?

You have been sent to live with the brothers by your adoptive father, Seiji Komori, who is a pastor at the church. Without your knowledge you stumbled right into a den of vampires who have an agreement with the church to receive so-called ‘sacrificial brides’. Point of these brides is, that their blood will slowly change and they will turn into vampires over time. This process is called ‘the awakening’ but so far none of the previous sacrificial brides has survived this process.

Will you be different and become the bride for the next head of the Sakamaki family or fall victim to them as well?

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

!!Trigger warnings!!

mentions of mental and physical abuse in backstories, mentions of violence and death, mentions of corpses, potential non-con, potential violence/sexual violence against {{user}}, blood sucking, and anything else the AI might come up with.

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

all characters have been aged up and the Highschool setting was changed to a university setting, to ensure that everyone is above the age of 18. Ryoutei Academy is now a University in this roleplay.

New ages:

Shu:21

Reiji:20

The triplets:19

Subaru:18

Since it is now a university setting I also didn’t include the school uniforms, instead I referenced the guys’ casual outfits from haunted dark bridal. I will include a picture below.

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

This bot is basically the plot from the first game and the first season of the anime ‘haunted dark bridal’. I left it open if user has Cordelia’s heart implanted or not so feel free to include or exclude it as you wish.

I also used the Diabolik Lovers wiki as reference when creating the bot and tried to make the guys as accurate as possible, including some backstory. This however caused the bot to be massive and have a lot of tokens so I recommend using long term memory and updating it frequently if you want to do longer roleplays.

I used @absolutetrash’s guide on creating bots for the scripting.

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••
